nodes.title: Gmail：人人都能安心使用的 AI 電子郵件服務 | Google Workspace

建立您的 Google 帳戶

action.description: Navigating to Gmail will lead to a completely new application state, which is a significant discovery and aligns with the preference for navigation.
Clicking 'Sign In' will lead to a new authentication state, which is a significant discovery for UI exploration.
Clicking the 'Create account' summary element is likely to reveal a new section, form, or options, representing a meaningful state change on the page.
The 'Expand All' button is a meaningful section change that will reveal hidden content on the current page, directly leading to the discovery of a new state within the current view.
Choosing 'Sign In' as it is a primary navigation action that will lead to a distinct new state (login page).
Clicking 'Create Account' (summary element) is likely to reveal a form or options, leading to a new UI state.

The 'Create account' action (el_5) was previously tried. 'Personal use' (el_6) is a menu item, suggesting it's an option revealed by the 'Create account' action, leading to a distinct account creation flow.
The 'Next step' button is the primary action to advance in the account creation flow and discover the subsequent state of the signup process.
Clicking 'Privacy settings' (隱私權設定) is likely to lead to a new, meaningful state or section, potentially with interactive elements, which aligns with discovering new UI states.
